<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Events; class PublishingStubs { use Dispatchable; /** * The stubs being published. * * @var array */ public $stubs = []; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param array $stubs */ public function __construct(array $stubs) { $this->stubs = $stubs; } /** * Add a new stub to be published. * * @param string $path * @param string $name * @return $this */ public function add(string $path, string $name) { $this->stubs[$path] = $name; return $this; } }
